link.name: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 185
link.alt: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 185

feat.name: Irezoko Tattoo
feat.text: Your face bears an intricate magical tattoo known as the *irezoko*, a badge of your understanding of your chosen field of magic and a recognition of your advancement within Absalom's College of Mysteries. Choose a class that you are a member of that grants you access to a focus pool. When you take this feat, it gains the trait that applies to your chosen class. Once per day, you may concentrate upon the pattern of your *irezoko* to recover 1 Focus Point as a three-action activity.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Bard
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the bard class.
